title: Senior Teacher - SRM University Holdings Services - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - SRM University Holdings Services - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
SRM University Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About SRM University Holdings Services:
SRM University Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University Holdings Services!
